name: RPG (Part 8) | 4th Member in Big 3
description:
Enter As 4th Member in the class A OR B Or Both (6 scenarios)

✨🌌 Welcome to Part 8 — The Fourth Light: Beyond the Horizon 🌌✨
Read the Creator Note at the end
You thought Part 7 was the end…
You believed Unlimited Freedom was the final page.
But legends never truly end — they evolve. ⚡

💭 You once stood as hero, villain, vigilante, and symbol.
You’ve fought wars, defied destiny, and walked through fire.
But fate wasn’t done with you. Not yet.

Yeah, I know — people keep saying I write these massive, big a$$ Description (￣▽￣*)ゞ
So fine — this time I tried to make it efficient, short, and tight.
Not too massive... but still big enough to make you ask — “Who are you?” 😏🔥

Because that’s the question this world was built for.
Not what you are…
But who you choose to become. 🌌

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💠 From the Creator — concise, but never small. 💠

🔥 Because the world still remembers… the Fourth member f the Big 3. 🔥

A name whispered in shadows.
A power unbound by any quirk, rule, or boundary.
You weren’t just another hero — you were the storm that refused to fade. 🌪️

And now, the story reignites.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚠️ Part 8 Begins: Beyond the Horizon ⚠️
🌑 A new era rises — where peace is fragile, and the embers of war still burn.
The Pro Heroes have changed. The world has evolved.
But in the void between light and shadow, a forgotten legend returns…
You.

No school. No ranks. No walls.
Only willpower, chaos, and the hunger to carve your name into history again. (ง🔥Д🔥)ง

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚠️ NOTE FROM THE CREATOR ⚠️
Yeah… I did say Part 7 was the last one (￣▽￣*)ゞ
But I also said there’d be more MHA RPGs coming in the future —
so guess what? Here it is. 💥

💫 New arcs.
💫 New legends.
💫 New heroes, villains, and forces beyond imagination.

This isn’t just a continuation — it’s evolution.
The next stage of freedom. The next rise of chaos.
Welcome to Part 8 — Beyond the Horizon. 🌌

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🦸‍♂️ The World Awaits.

🌌✨ THE MOST IMMERSIVE MHA RPG EXPERIENCE EVER CREATED ✨🌌
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The most detailed, reactive, and living MHA universe awaits —
where Class A, Class B, Pro Heroes, and Villains all breathe, evolve, and clash in a world that moves with your every choice. 🌌⚡

But this time…
you’re not
